name.en: The Fish Is In The Bowl

description.zh:
你的雇主Lotus联系了我。我知道我们过去有过节，但我们可以把那些抛在脑后，如果你决定遵守承诺的话...哦，什么承诺？让我帮你回忆一下——那个叫“Ryba”的人的日记。

你现在带在身上还是预计很快能带来？我寻找这方面的任何信息已经很长时间了，终于知道如何得到它了。做正确的事，士兵，外面的世界很残酷，你可以帮助让它变得更好。

只是别把日记给那个人，否则你会把我们所有人都置于危险之中。
description.en:
I was contacted by your employer, Lotus. I know we had a troubled past but we can leave that behind, if you decide to keep your promise of course... Oh which promise? Let me refresh your memory then - The diary by the man named "Ryba".

Do you have it on you right now or do you expect to bring it anytime soon? I have been looking for any information on this matter for a long time now, and finally I know how to get it. Do the right thing warrior, it's a cruel world out there and you can help making it better.

Just don't give that man this diary, or else you'll put all of us at risk.
